info.name: Expense Tracker — Notifications
info.description:
Postman collection for the Notification API of the Expense Tracker Spring Boot application.

Set the following collection variables before running:
- `base_url` → http://localhost:8081
- `token`    → JWT obtained from POST /api/auth/login
- `notification_id` → ID of a notification to test single-record endpoints

variable.description: JWT access token obtained from POST /api/auth/login
ID of a notification to use in single-record endpoints

request.description: Returns a paginated list of all notifications for the authenticated user, ordered by createdAt descending.

response.name: 200 OK — Paginated Notifications
response.body:
{
  "status": true,
  "message": "Notifications fetched successfully",
  "data": {
    "content": [
      {
        "id": 12,
        "title": "Budget Alert",
        "message": "You've used 75% of your category budget of ₹8000.0.",
        "type": "BUDGET_ALERT",
        "isRead": false,
        "entityType": "Budget",
        "entityId": 1,
        "createdAt": "2026-03-14T18:30:05"
      },
      {
        "id": 11,
        "title": "Recurring Expense Processed",
        "message": "₹649.0 for \"Netflix\" was auto-deducted today. Next due: 2026-04-16.",
        "type": "RECURRING_EXPENSE_DUE",
        "isRead": true,
        "entityType": "RecurringExpense",
        "entityId": 5,
        "createdAt": "2026-03-16T00:05:01"
      }
    ],
    "totalElements": 5,
    "totalPages": 1,
    "number": 0,
    "size": 20
  }
}

request.description: Returns all unread notifications for the authenticated user, ordered by createdAt descending. Not paginated.

response.name: 200 OK — Unread Notifications

request.description: Returns the total count of unread notifications for the authenticated user. Useful for badge counters in a UI.

Marks a single notification as read. Returns 404 if the notification does not belong to the authenticated user.

Audit action: NOTIFICATION_READ

response.name: 200 OK — Marked as Read
response.body:
{
  "status": true,
  "message": "Notification marked as read",
  "data": {
    "id": 12,
    "title": "Budget Alert",
    "message": "You've used 75% of your category budget of ₹8000.0.",
    "type": "BUDGET_ALERT",
    "isRead": true,
    "entityType": "Budget",
    "entityId": 1,
    "createdAt": "2026-03-14T18:30:05"
  }
}

response.name: 404 Not Found

request.description: Marks all unread notifications for the authenticated user as read in a single operation. Returns the count of notifications updated.

Permanently deletes a notification. Returns 404 if the notification does not belong to the authenticated user.

Audit action: NOTIFICATION_DELETED

response.name: 404 Not Found
